strategy: Small Myth boss (1,965). He takes +20% from Storm and resists Myth 50%. Hit with Storm or a non-Myth school.
Attacking him without a Shield up triggers Vampire on you, so keep a shield active on the turn you swing.
From Round 2, every other round he strips all wards (shields and traps) off a random wizard. Re-shield after these wipes and do not over-invest in traps that may be removed.
Blade, keep a shield up, and hit with Storm.
cheatNotes: Attacking him with no Shield up triggers Vampire on you. Keep a shield active on the round you hit.
